---
title: "Blog & Commentary"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  feed: true
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<span class="section-label">Market Commentary & Analysis</span>
<div class="rule-accent"></div>

Practical market analysis and economic commentary for cattle producers, ranchers, and agribusiness professionals in the western U.S. Posts are written for decision-makers, not academic audiences.

---
